question: Does the layout feature an organizational chart on the left (approx. 65%) and a matrix table with legend on the right (approx. 35%)?
Does the organizational chart consist of exactly 4 hierarchical layers with consistent vertical spacing?
Does Layer 1 contain exactly one centered node labeled 'C0'?
Does Layer 2 contain exactly 3 nodes labeled 'A1', 'A2', and 'A3' arranged equidistantly on a horizontal line?
Does Layer 3 contain exactly 6 nodes labeled 'B1' through 'B6'?
Are the B-nodes grouped correctly: B1/B2 under A1, B3/B4 under A2, and B5/B6 under A3?
Does Layer 4 contain exactly 12 leaf nodes labeled 'D1' through 'D12' (2 under each B node)?
Are all nodes depicted as identically sized rounded rectangles?
Are the connection lines in the organizational chart right-angle polylines (orthogonal)?
Is there a dashed arrow specifically pointing from node B2 to node B4?
Is the connection line between node A1 and node D1 rendered as a dash-dot style line?
Does the matrix table on the right consist of exactly 6 rows and 5 columns?
Does the top-left cell of the matrix have a diagonal split with 'ROW' in the bottom-left and 'COL' in the top-right?
Are the matrix column headers (row 1, cols 2-5) labeled C1, C2, C3, C4?
Are the matrix row headers (col 1, rows 2-6) labeled R1, R2, R3, R4, R5?
Does matrix row R1 contain the symbol sequence: ●, ○, —, ○?
Does matrix row R2 contain the symbol sequence: ○, —, ○, ●?
Does matrix row R3 contain the symbol sequence: —, ○, ●, ○?
Does matrix row R4 contain the symbol sequence: ○, ●, ○, —?
Does matrix row R5 contain the symbol sequence: ●, ○, —, ○?
Is there a three-row legend below the matrix correctly defining: ● L1, ○ L2, — L3?
Does the entire image use only black, white, and gray colors (no chromatic colors)?
Is the image completely free of perspective effects and shadows (flat design)?
Are all text labels legible and free of garbled characters or non-Latin symbols?
